svg.title: Premium abstract transparent vector artwork
svg.desc: Detailed SVG vectorization generated from the transparent PNG source using 2 pixel vector cells, preserving transparent background, panels, gold linework, dots, glows, labels, and texture.
svg.metadata: source: public/ChatGPT Image 19. Mai 2026, 10_45_16-transparent.png original-size: 1553x1013 vector-cell-size: 2px vector-cells: 73533 style-groups: 5564 background: transparent
